samples.gvd:
module multi_pipe_8bit
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input mul_en_in,
    input mul_a,
    input mul_b,
    output mul_en_out,
    output mul_out
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description: Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing. Clock. Active-low reset. Input enable bit for multiplication. Input multiplicand. Input multiplier. Output enable bit for multiplication. Output product. 8 Reset the internal state. if (!rst_n) begin mul_en_out_reg <= 'd0; sum_reg_0 <= 'd0; sum_reg_1 <= 'd0; sum_reg_2 <= 'd0; sum_reg_3 <= 'd0; sum_reg_4 <= 'd0; sum_reg_5 <= 'd0; sum_reg_6 <= 'd0; sum_reg_7 <= 'd0; mul_out_reg <= 'd0; mul_a_reg <= 'd0; mul_b_reg <= 'd0; end Update the mul_en_out_reg with the mul_en_in signal. mul_en_out_reg[0] <= mul_en_in; Update the mul_en_out with the mul_en_out_reg[0]. mul_en_out <= mul_en_out_reg[0]; Update the mul_a_reg and mul_b_reg with the mul_a and mul_b. mul_a_reg <= mul_a; mul_b_reg <= mul_b; Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the first bit of mul_b_reg. temp[0] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[0]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_0) 1'b0: sum[0] <= temp[0]; 1'b1: sum[0] <= temp[0] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_0 with the sum[0]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_0 <= sum[0]; end Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the second bit of mul_b_reg. temp[1] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[1]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_1) 1'b0: sum[1] <= temp[1]; 1'b1: sum[1] <= temp[1] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_1 with the sum[1]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_1 <= sum[1]; end Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the third bit of mul_b_reg. temp[2] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[2]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_2) 1'b0: sum[2] <= temp[2]; 1'b1: sum[2] <= temp[2] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_2 with the sum[2]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_2 <= sum[2]; end Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the fourth bit of mul_b_reg. temp[3] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[3]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_3) 1'b0: sum[3] <= temp[3]; 1'b1: sum[3] <= temp[3] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_3 with the sum[3]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_3 <= sum[3]; end Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the fifth bit of mul_b_reg. temp[4] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[4]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_4) 1'b0: sum[4] <= temp[4]; 1'b1: sum[4] <= temp[4] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_4 with the sum[4]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_4 <= sum[4]; end Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the sixth bit of mul_b_reg. temp[5] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[5]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_5) 1'b0: sum[5] <= temp[5]; 1'b1: sum[5] <= temp[5] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_5 with the sum[5]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_5 <= sum[5]; end Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the seventh bit of mul_b_reg. temp[6] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[6]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_6) 1'b0: sum[6] <= temp[6]; 1'b1: sum[6] <= temp[6] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_6 with the sum[6]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_6 <= sum[6]; end Generate the temp value based on the mul_a_reg and the eighth bit of mul_b_reg. temp[7] <= mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[7]}}; Generate the sum_reg value based on the temp. always @(posedge clk) begin case (sum_reg_7) 1'b0: sum[7] <= temp[7]; 1'b1: sum[7] <= temp[7] + 1'b1; endcase end Update the sum_reg_7 with the sum[7]. always @(posedge clk) begin sum_reg_7 <= sum[7]; end Calculate the mul_out_reg based on the sum_reg_7. always @(posedge clk) begin case (mul_out_reg) 1'b0: mul_out_reg <= sum_reg_7; 1'b1: mul_out_reg <= sum_reg_7 + 1'b1; endcase end Update the mul_out with the mul_out_reg. mul_out <= mul_en_out ? mul_out_reg : 16'd0;
